metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Storage Account scope.
A (UAMI, role definition) pair generated for each role assignment iteration.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Storage Account scope.
A (principal object ID, role definition) pair generated for each service principal/user role assignment iteration.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
The location for the resource group and Storage Account resources
Tags applied to all resources
The SKU name for the Storage Account
The kind of Storage Account
The access tier for the Storage Account
Enable hierarchical namespace (Data Lake Gen2)
Public network access setting
Allow shared key access (Entra ID-only when false)
Blob containers to create
Queues to create
Tables to create
File shares to create
Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to grant Storage Data permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no UAMI is attached.
Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant Storage Data permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no service principal is attached.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant Storage Data permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no user is attached.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Storage Account scope.
Enable Azure Monitor based observability resources (Log Analytics workspace and diagnostic settings).

The name of the Storage Account

The names of created blob containers
The names of created queues
The names of created tables
The names of created file shares
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The Azure region where the Log Analytics workspace will be created
Tags applied to the Log Analytics workspace
The retention period (days) for workspace data
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the diagnostic settings resource
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace destination
The name of the existing Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide either this or targetServerName.
The name of the existing Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide either this or targetAccountName.
The name of the existing Storage Account that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide this to enable Storage Account subservice diagnostics.
The storage services to configure diagnostics for (only used when targetStorageAccountName is provided)
The diagnostic log settings to configure
The diagnostic metric settings to configure
The resource ID of the diagnostic settings resource

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), parameters('targetServerName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null())), if(and(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'blob')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder'), 'default'), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', format('{0}-blob', parameters('name'))), null())), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the diagnostic settings resource

name.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), parameters('name'), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('name'), null())), if(and(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'blob')), format('{0}-blob', parameters('name')), null())), parameters('name'))]

metadata.description: The name of the target Azure AI Foundry account resource
The name of the target Storage Account resource
The principal ID that receives the role assignment
The fully qualified role definition resource ID
The principal type for the role assignment
Optional deterministic seed for role assignment name; when omitted, a deterministic name is generated
The resource ID of the role assignment

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), '')]
